name: just-every/code
summary: Codex fork whose Auto Drive orchestration routes milestone work through coordinator-managed helper agents, enforces evidence-backed completion, and pairs autonomous execution with automated review.
evidence: Auto Drive runs through `code-auto-drive-core`, where coordinator decisions are parsed from a strict schema covering finish status, milestone prompt, CLI model routing, helper-agent timing, and finish evidence.
Auto Review captures ghost commits and shares a file lock plus monotonic snapshot epochs across exec, TUI, and Auto Drive paths so reviews do not overlap or continue from stale snapshots.
